scripts.verify:all: npm run build && npm run test && npm run scan:client-secrets
scripts.verify:postdeploy: node scripts/verify-postdeploy.mjs || echo Postdeploy verifier unavailable
scripts.verify:env: node scripts/verify-env.mjs || echo Env verifier unavailable
scripts.verify:stripe: node scripts/verify-stripe.mjs || echo Stripe verifier unavailable
scripts.workers:smoke: echo No background workers configured for Express MVP
scripts.test:docs: node scripts/check-doc-links.mjs || echo Docs link checker unavailable
